window_summary: This window tracks the recent release evolution of exelban/stats, a macOS system monitor, from v2.11.54 through v2.12.15. The releases include new features such as CPU average load, chart style improvements, widget updates, localization additions, and bug fixes across multiple versions.

chunks.title: v2.11.54
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: exelban/stats
Release: v2.11.54
Tag: v2.11.54; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-09-28T15:27:28Z; created_at: 2025-09-28T15:27:22Z
Release notes:
## New features
- feat: added CPU average load to the Remote protocol and moved from the list of Double to the struct
- feat: added round style to some charts to have more Apple-like style charts
- feat: removed header line from the popup view
- feat: moved App settings from the menu to the bottom part of the sidebar
- feat: adjusted settings window to the new macOS design
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the exelban/stats release v2.11.54, new features include adding CPU average load to the Remote protocol and moving from a list of Double to a struct, adding round style to some charts for a more Apple-like appearance, removing the header line from the popup view, moving App settings from the menu to the bottom part of the sidebar, and adjusting the settings window to the new macOS design.

chunks.title: v2.11.55
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: exelban/stats
Release: v2.11.55
Tag: v2.11.55; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-09-30T15:34:13Z; created_at: 2025-09-30T15:34:07Z
Release notes:
**HOT FIX**
- fix: disabled widgets update for macOS 26 since there is a problem with `chronod`
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the exelban/stats release v2.11.55, a hot fix disables widgets update for macOS 26 due to a problem with 'chronod'.

chunks.title: v2.11.56
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: exelban/stats
Release: v2.11.56
Tag: v2.11.56; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-10-05T13:56:43Z; created_at: 2025-10-05T13:56:32Z
Release notes:
## Bug fixes
- fix: fixed app crash when battery is damaged (#2725)
- fix: fixed initializing update interval from the store (#2741)
## New features
- feat: added a new way to obtain the WiFi network SSID (thanks to @fjh658)
- feat: added display information to the Dashboard
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the exelban/stats release v2.11.56, bug fixes address an app crash when the battery is damaged and fix initializing the update interval from the store. New features add a new way to obtain the WiFi network SSID and add display information to the Dashboard.

chunks.title: v2.11.57
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: exelban/stats
Release: v2.11.57
Tag: v2.11.57; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-10-12T16:55:30Z; created_at: 2025-10-12T16:55:01Z
Release notes:
## Bug fixes
- fix: fixed check if key exists in the Store after adding cache layer (#2749)
- fix: adjusted table height in the Clock settings for macOS 26
## New features
- feat: included previous and new IP addresses in the notifications (#2637)
- feat: added bug report template to the report bug button
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the exelban/stats release v2.11.57, bug fixes include fixing a check if a key exists in the Store after adding a cache layer and adjusting table height in the Clock settings for macOS 26. New features include including previous and new IP addresses in notifications and adding a bug report template to the report bug button.

chunks.title: v2.11.58
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: exelban/stats
Release: v2.11.58
Tag: v2.11.58; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-10-26T12:48:56Z; created_at: 2025-10-26T12:48:51Z
Release notes:
## Bug fixes
- fix: corrected NVMe SMART data units read/written calculation (#2760)
- fix: added an additional redraw when something changes in the Battery widget. This eliminates artifacts when the widget switches from the AC plug-in icon to the charging icon (#2611)
## New features
- feat: added gradient style to the line chart
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the exelban/stats release v2.11.58, bug fixes correct NVMe SMART data units read/written calculation and add an additional redraw when something changes in the Battery widget to eliminate artifacts when switching from AC plug-in to charging icon. A new feature adds gradient style to the line chart.

chunks.title: v2.11.59
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: exelban/stats
Release: v2.11.59
Tag: v2.11.59; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-11-09T13:08:32Z; created_at: 2025-11-09T13:08:28Z
Release notes:
## Bug fixes
- fix: fixed bug on macOS 26 when settings autosaveName to menu bar item prevents it from loading (#2768)
## New features
- feat: adjusted value width in process view to fit bigger value (#2784)
## Localization
- lang: updated Vietnamese translations for various terms and phrases (#2791)
- lang: added translations for internet status notifications
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the exelban/stats release v2.11.59, a bug fix addresses an issue on macOS 26 where setting autosaveName to the menu bar item prevents it from loading. A new feature adjusts value width in the process view to fit bigger values. Localization updates include updated Vietnamese translations and added translations for internet status notifications.

chunks.title: v2.11.60
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: exelban/stats
Release: v2.11.60
Tag: v2.11.60; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-11-14T10:09:58Z; created_at: 2025-11-13T16:40:43Z
Release notes:
## New features
- feat: unlocked widgets updates since the `chronod` was fixed in macOS 26.1 (#2733)
- feat: moved remote authorization from api. to oauth. domain name
## Localization
- lang: updated german localization (#2812)
- lang: updated Taiwan Traditional Chinese Localization (#2809)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the exelban/stats release v2.11.60, new features unlock widgets updates since 'chronod' was fixed in macOS 26.1 and move remote authorization from api. to oauth. domain name. Localization updates include updated German and Taiwan Traditional Chinese localizations.

chunks.title: v2.11.61
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: exelban/stats
Release: v2.11.61
Tag: v2.11.61; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-11-14T10:12:13Z; created_at: 2025-11-14T10:12:06Z
Release notes:
**HOT FIX**
- fix: reverted enabling macOS widget updates since there is still a problem with `chronod` (#2733)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the exelban/stats release v2.11.61, a hot fix reverts enabling macOS widget updates since there is still a problem with 'chronod'.

chunks.title: v2.11.62
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: exelban/stats
Release: v2.11.62
Tag: v2.11.62; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-12-07T16:23:00Z; created_at: 2025-12-07T16:22:53Z
Release notes:
## Bug fixes
- fix: fixed a long-term battery widget glitch when a black vertical line is visible in the widget preview
## New features
- feat: added a fallback to the CPU core index when id not found when calculating the cores load (#2785)
- feat: add option to disable system-widget updates for users experiencing ongoing chronod issues (#2733)
- feat: added a check if the macOS widget is active before updating the read value in the user defaults. It will prevent unnecessary writes when the widget is not enabled (#2733)
- feat: moved from telemetry id to remote id for Remote module
- feat: removed the Telemetry module from the Stats since it does not do anything for a long time
## Localization
- lang: updated Vietnamese localization for internet connection messages (#2818)
- lang: updated Turkish translation (#2843)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the exelban/stats release v2.11.62, a bug fix addresses a long-term battery widget glitch where a black vertical line is visible in the widget preview. New features add a fallback to the CPU core index when id not found when calculating cores load, add an option to disable system-widget updates for users experiencing ongoing chronod issues, add a check if the macOS widget is active before updating the read value in user defaults to prevent unnecessary writes, move from telemetry id to remote id for the Remote module, and remove the Telemetry module. Localization updates include updated Vietnamese and Turkish translations.

chunks.title: v2.11.63
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: exelban/stats
Release: v2.11.63
Tag: v2.11.63; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-12-28T12:33:26Z; created_at: 2025-12-28T12:33:18Z
Release notes:
## Bug fixes
- fix: implemented local caching for settings list to prevent storage thrashing (#2840) (#2864)
- fix: moved WKWebView initialization to the moment when it should be displayed, which prevents the initialization of the web view on app start and silences some system logs
## New features
- feat: small redesign in the Network popup view. Moved interface details to the dedicated section, added interface dns servers (#2789), added interface speed (#2702)
- feat: added ip change counter to the ip change notification that prevents notification when ip disappears for 3 reads
## Localization
- lang: updated Simplified Chinese localization by removing spaces in phrases (#2877)
- lang: aligned Triditional Chinese localizations with Apple terminology (#2876)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the exelban/stats release v2.11.63, bug fixes implement local caching for settings list to prevent storage thrashing and move WKWebView initialization to when it should be displayed to prevent initialization on app start and silence system logs. New features include a small redesign in the Network popup view with interface details, DNS servers, and interface speed, and add an IP change counter to the IP change notification. Localization updates include updated Simplified Chinese and Traditional Chinese localizations.

chunks.raw_text:

Release: v2.11.64

## Localization

- lang: updated Japanese localization for Clock settings (#2889)
- lang: updated Simplified Chinese localization for network messages (#2888)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the exelban/stats release v2.11.64, a bug fix corrects case values for SP4B and SP69 in smc.swift. Localization updates add Korean translation for Fixed scale and Toggle the module, update Japanese localization for Clock settings, and update Simplified Chinese localization for network messages.

chunks.title: v2.11.65
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: exelban/stats
Release: v2.11.65
Tag: v2.11.65; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-02-01T16:50:48Z; created_at: 2026-02-01T16:49:52Z
Release notes:
## Bug fixes
- fix: fixed race condition crashes in Chart and Stack widgets (#2944)
## New features
- feat: added clearing the process after it was killed
- feat: added -9 code to kill command when killing the process from the popup view (#2900)
- feat: added an option to manually refresh disk space information (allow to reset cached purgable space)
- feat: added jitter to the network module that is calculated from the ICMP signals
## Localization
- lang: updated Japanese translations for notifications and calendar module (#2911)
- lang: updated Korean translations for Text and Battery details widgets (#2910)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the exelban/stats release v2.11.65, a bug fix addresses race condition crashes in Chart and Stack widgets. New features add clearing the process after it was killed, add -9 code to kill command when killing a process from the popup view, add an option to manually refresh disk space information, and add jitter to the network module calculated from ICMP signals. Localization updates include updated Japanese and Korean translations.

chunks.raw_text:

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the exelban/stats release v2.11.66, a bug fix corrects the build version.

chunks.title: v2.11.67
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: exelban/stats
Release: v2.11.67
Tag: v2.11.67; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-02-15T17:08:43Z; created_at: 2026-02-15T17:02:16Z
Release notes:
# Last release with macOS 10.15 support
## Bug fixes
- fix: renamed telemetry_id to remote_id when export/import settings (#2955)
## New features
- feat: changed the default value of `macOS widgets` to disabled to prevent heavy load on some systems, and added information text to the widgets (#2733)
- feat: added CPU frequency support for M5 (#2943) type
## Localization
- lang: refined German localization strings (#2945)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the exelban/stats release v2.11.67, which is the last release with macOS 10.15 support, a bug fix renames telemetry_id to remote_id when exporting/importing settings. New features change the default value of macOS widgets to disabled to prevent heavy load on some systems and add information text to the widgets, and add CPU frequency support for M5 type. Localization updates refine German localization strings.

chunks.title: v2.12.0
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: exelban/stats
Release: v2.12.0
Tag: v2.12.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-02-22T15:05:37Z; created_at: 2026-02-22T15:05:17Z
Release notes:
## New features
- feat: changed minimum macOS version to macOS 11.15 (Big Sur)
- feat: added better fan control for M3/M4 Apple Silicon (#2924)
- feat: added week numbers toggle to Clock calendar (#2933)
## Localization
- lang: added translation for `Show week numbers`
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the exelban/stats release v2.12.0, new features change the minimum macOS version to macOS 11.15 (Big Sur), add better fan control for M3/M4 Apple Silicon, and add a week numbers toggle to the Clock calendar. Localization adds translation for 'Show week numbers'.

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the exelban/stats release v2.12.1, bug fixes cherry-pick changes to fix the automatic fan mode after sleep and remove menu item position control when showing widget in the menu bar. A new feature adds flag emoji instead of country code in the popup view, and countryCode and flag options to the Text widget. Localization updates Taiwan Traditional Chinese localization.

chunks.title: v2.12.2
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: exelban/stats
Release: v2.12.2
Tag: v2.12.2; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-03-08T14:40:56Z; created_at: 2026-03-08T14:40:34Z
Release notes:
# New features
- feat: added an option to resize the settings window, also the settings window position and size will be autosaved
- feat: added a new way to obtain Bluetooth device battery levels using pmset (#2990)
- feat: added an option to use a HTTP method for connectivity check (#2971)
## Localization
- lang: generated missing translations for all languages using translategemma:4b model
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the exelban/stats release v2.12.2, new features add an option to resize the settings window with autosaved position and size, add a new way to obtain Bluetooth device battery levels using pmset, and add an option to use an HTTP method for connectivity check. Localization generates missing translations for all languages using a translategemma:4b model.

chunks.raw_text:
Repository: exelban/stats

**HOT FIX**
- fixed: fixed missing background on older macOS (#3015)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the exelban/stats release v2.12.3, a hot fix addresses a missing background on older macOS.

chunks.title: v2.12.4
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: exelban/stats
Release: v2.12.4
Tag: v2.12.4; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-03-15T10:03:46Z; created_at: 2026-03-15T10:02:57Z
Release notes:
## Bug fixes
- fix: fixed Apple Silicon power readings scaling with update interval (#3018)
- fix: fixed incorrect CPU tick calculation after UInt32 overflow (#3014)
## New features
- feat: added base M5 CPU and GPU core sensors (#3027)
- feat: limited WiFi details read every 15 seconds to reduce CPU usage
- feat: added new MacBooks ids and new MacBook Neo to the known devices
- feat: added an option to sync reader fire time to the second bound that helps to sync time in Clock module
- feat: added sleep mode to the reader, in some cases there is no need for reads since the widget is not visualizing anything. In this case, the reader could go to sleep mode and be active only when popup is open. It's available only for the sensor module for now.
- feat: added an option to sync clock with ntp server and moved reader to separate file
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the exelban/stats release v2.12.4, bug fixes correct Apple Silicon power readings scaling with update interval and fix incorrect CPU tick calculation after UInt32 overflow. New features add base M5 CPU and GPU core sensors, limit WiFi details read every 15 seconds to reduce CPU usage, add new MacBooks ids and new MacBook Neo to known devices, add an option to sync reader fire time to the second bound, add sleep mode to the reader for sensor module, and add an option to sync clock with NTP server and move reader to separate file.

chunks.title: v2.12.5
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: exelban/stats
Release: v2.12.5
Tag: v2.12.5; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-03-22T19:00:31Z; created_at: 2026-03-22T19:00:05Z
Release notes:
## Bug fixes
- fix: corrected Mac Studio M3 Ultra name and release years in deviceDict (#3066)
- fix: fixed fan control helper on M5 (#3051)
- fix: adjusted clock list table height to be fully visible in the min window size (#3032)
## New features
- feat: added `Enable in Settings` text to all macOS widgets
- feat: improved support for new M5 gen (#3047, #3050)
- feat: added an option to switch between emoji flag and country code in the Network module (#3034)
- feat: updated M5 cpu sensors (thanks to @MiikaLaurila and @dkorunic)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the exelban/stats release v2.12.5, bug fixes correct Mac Studio M3 Ultra name and release years in deviceDict, fix fan control helper on M5, and adjust clock list table height to be fully visible in the min window size. New features add 'Enable in Settings' text to all macOS widgets, improve support for new M5 gen, add an option to switch between emoji flag and country code in the Network module, and update M5 cpu sensors.

chunks.title: v2.12.8
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: exelban/stats
Release: v2.12.8
Tag: v2.12.8; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-04-05T14:44:12Z; created_at: 2026-04-05T14:44:00Z
Release notes:
## Bug fixes
- fix: fixed data race in the Disk processes reader (#3100)
## New features
- feat: added Dot widget to the RAM module to visualize the ram pressure level (#3042)
- feat: small improvements in the Remote module
- feat: moved State widget to Dot widget. From now it will just show any color provided by module
- feat: initialized CPU preview component (not active for now)
- feat: added label to Stack widget that allow to show bluetooth device name instead of id
## Localization
- lang: updated missing translations
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the exelban/stats release v2.12.8, a bug fix addresses a data race in the Disk processes reader. New features add a Dot widget to the RAM module to visualize ram pressure level, make small improvements in the Remote module, move the State widget to Dot widget to show any color provided by module, initialize a CPU preview component (not active), and add a label to the Stack widget to show Bluetooth device name instead of id. Localization updates missing translations.

chunks.title: v2.12.9

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the exelban/stats release v2.12.9, bug fixes address a data race in the Sensors popup, fix the Fan helper installation process by using System over domain for launchd, and fix a Line Chart draw offset. New features add a RAM preview (disabled), add ANE utilization to the GPU module. Localization improves Korean language support, updates Japanese translations, and adds missing translations.

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the exelban/stats release v2.12.11, a bug fix corrects the release version for v2.12.10.

chunks.title: v2.12.12
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: exelban/stats
Release: v2.12.12
Tag: v2.12.12; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-04-26T11:02:54Z; created_at: 2026-04-26T11:02:47Z
Release notes:
## Bug fixes
- fix: refresh popup readers when popup reopens (#2988)
## New features
- feat: adjusted stepper field width constraints (#3105)
- feat: improvements in the Remote module
- feat: moved ANE utilization from read to calculation from power usage
- feat: added Disk preview (disabled for now)
- feat: improved updater mechanism for better handling of the mount point, and added new app version signature
- feat: removed powermetric from the SMC helper. It was added with the idea that it might be used someday, but due to security risks, I will just remove it from the app.
## Localization
- lang: updated Japanese translations for clarity and accuracy (#3161)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the exelban/stats release v2.12.12, a bug fix refreshes popup readers when the popup reopens. New features adjust stepper field width constraints, make improvements in the Remote module, move ANE utilization from read to calculation from power usage, add a Disk preview (disabled), improve the updater mechanism for better handling of the mount point and add a new app version signature, and remove powermetric from the SMC helper. Localization updates Japanese translations for clarity and accuracy.

chunks.title: v2.12.14
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: exelban/stats
Release: v2.12.14
Tag: v2.12.14; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-05-17T09:54:14Z; created_at: 2026-05-17T09:54:01Z
Release notes:
## Bug fixes
- fix: fixed possible memory leaks
- fix: fixed display fps visibility in the GPU popup
## New features
- feat: added custom colors for widgets (#3165)
- feat: redesigned Network usage timer (#3175)
- feat: fixed stale CPU popup data when reopening the popup
- feat: improved LineChart rendering by showing gaps when data is unavailable instead of drawing a misleading continuous line
- feat: added timestamp tooltips to the connectivity chart
- feat: added Network preview (disabled for now)
- feat: moved Settings, Update, Setup, and Support windows to lazy-loaded initialization, reducing startup memory usage according to Stats.
- feat: added How to contribute section to the README.md
- feat: added System Stats account information to the Stats, for non free users the contribution alert will be hidden
## Localization
- lang: improved German translations (#3207)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the exelban/stats release v2.12.14, bug fixes address possible memory leaks and fix display fps visibility in the GPU popup. New features add custom colors for widgets, redesign the Network usage timer, fix stale CPU popup data when reopening the popup, improve LineChart rendering by showing gaps when data is unavailable, add timestamp tooltips to the connectivity chart, add a Network preview (disabled), move Settings, Update, Setup, and Support windows to lazy-loaded initialization to reduce startup memory usage, add a How to contribute section to the README.md, and add System Stats account information to hide contribution alert for non-free users. Localization improves German translations.

chunks.title: v2.12.15
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: exelban/stats
Release: v2.12.15
Tag: v2.12.15; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-05-24T16:39:32Z; created_at: 2026-05-24T16:38:48Z
Release notes:
## Bug fixes
- fix: reverted to volumeAvailableCapacityForImportantUsageKey for disk free space since CSDiskSpaceGetRecoveryEstimate + purgeable space is unreliable
- fix: fixed stale data on popup reopen across all modules (matches CPU fix)
## New features
- feat: added calendar selecting option to the Clock module (#3230)
- feat: renamed Remote plugin to SystemStats
- feat: adjusted Repeater leeway to better manage reads
- feat: added RegexCache to the TextWidget that allows caching some calculations
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the exelban/stats release v2.12.15, bug fixes revert to volumeAvailableCapacityForImportantUsageKey for disk free space due to unreliability of CSDiskSpaceGetRecoveryEstimate plus purgeable space, and fix stale data on popup reopen across all modules. New features add a calendar selecting option to the Clock module, rename Remote plugin to SystemStats, adjust Repeater leeway to better manage reads, and add RegexCache to the TextWidget for caching calculations.

questions.query_text: In the exelban/stats releases, which release adds a gradient style to the line chart?

answer_support.answer_text: added gradient style to the line chart

questions.query_text: Across the exelban/stats releases, how does the handling of macOS widget updates differ between v2.11.60 and v2.11.61?

options.text: v2.11.60 unlocks widgets updates after chronod fix, while v2.11.61 reverts enabling widget updates due to ongoing chronod problems.
v2.11.60 disables widgets updates, while v2.11.61 enables them.
Both releases add new widget styles.
v2.11.60 adds widget previews, while v2.11.61 removes them.

questions.expected_answer: v2.11.60 unlocks widgets updates after chronod fix, while v2.11.61 reverts enabling widget updates due to ongoing chronod problems.

answer_support.answer_text: unlocked widgets updates since the chronod was fixed in macOS 26.1
reverted enabling macOS widget updates since there is still a problem with chronod

questions.query_text: In the exelban/stats release window, order the following release-content states from earliest to latest: (1) a release that adds CPU average load to the Remote protocol and moves App settings to the sidebar, (2) a release that changes the minimum macOS version to Big Sur and adds better fan control for M3/M4, (3) a release that adds a Dot widget to the RAM module and initializes a CPU preview component, (4) a release that adds custom colors for widgets and moves Settings windows to lazy-loaded initialization.

answer_support.answer_text: added CPU average load to the Remote protocol ... moved App settings from the menu to the bottom part of the sidebar
changed minimum macOS version to macOS 11.15 (Big Sur) ... added better fan control for M3/M4 Apple Silicon
added Dot widget to the RAM module ... initialized CPU preview component
added custom colors for widgets ... moved Settings, Update, Setup, and Support windows to lazy-loaded initialization
